name: Are You Safe?
statement:
Seven boys and seven girls from Athens were brought before King Minos. The evil king laughed and said "I hope you enjoy your stay in Crete".
With a loud clang, the doors behind them shut, and darkness reigned. The terrified children huddled together. In the distance they heard a bellowing, unholy roar.
Bravely, they advanced forward, to their doom.
